description_long: This is a compact, modern cabin with a rectangular footprint, clad in vertical wooden siding and featuring a flat, slightly angled roof. The front facade includes a spacious wooden deck with outdoor seating, partially shaded by a large retractable awning. The cabin has a prominent, large arched window on one end, complemented by several smaller, circular and rectangular windows distributed asymmetrically along the sides. A single main door is located on the front, adjacent to a small glass-railed entry platform. The structure sits on a raised platform, suggesting a modular or prefabricated design suitable for urban infill or backyard placement. The overall aesthetic is contemporary, blending natural wood textures with clean, geometric lines.
description: A modern, wood-clad cabin with a flat roof, large arched window, and a front deck shaded by a retractable awning. Features include asymmetrical windows, a single main door, and a raised platform base.
description_view_0: Side view showing the black rear facade with two small circular windows and the edge of the shaded front deck.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wooden deck, outdoor seating, retractable awning, main door, and glass-railed entry platform.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the large arched window, a small circular window above, and the continuation of the wooden siding.
description_view_3: Rear view with a mostly solid black facade, two small windows, and no visible entry points or deck.
attribute_roof_type: flat roof with a slight angle, featuring a large retractable awning over the front deck
attribute_window_arrangement: Asymmetrical arrangement with one large arched window and small circular windows on the sides, plus rectangular windows on the front and side; no clear pattern but visually balanced
attribute_door_placement: Single exterior door located on the front facade, offset to the right, adjacent to the entry platform and deck
